hero.title: Make Agentic OS truly yours
hero.subtitle: Agent App, Live App, and Bridge App are the three first-class citizens of Agentic OS. Pick and configure them to make the whole system work your way.

page.heroSubtitle: Agent Apps are first-class citizens of Agentic OS. Pick and configure your thinking apps to make the whole system work your way.
page.empty: No agent apps are available right now
page.bannerPrompt: Open {{name}} and enter its application workflow

coding.name: Coding App
coding.description: A coding mode app built from Agentic, Plan, and Debug, covering implementation, planning, and troubleshooting.

cowork.name: Cowork
cowork.description: A standalone Agent app for office collaboration, drafting, and day-to-day execution.

design.name: Design
design.description: A standalone Agent app for HTML prototypes, visual artifacts, and design exploration.

claw.name: Claw
claw.description: A standalone Agent app for persistent personal-assistant style collaboration with memory and preferences.

appDetail.bannerPrompt: The agents included in this app collaborate as part of the application workflow
appDetail.includedAgentsSubtitle: Open any agent to inspect capabilities, tools, and skill configuration

liveApp.title: Live Apps
liveApp.subtitle: User-centric apps generated by Agent on demand. Each Live App is persistent — it lives, evolves, and can be reused.
liveApp.selectFolderTitle: Select live app directory (must contain meta.json and source/)

empty.generate: Generate as you chat, ready instantly. Start a conversation with AI to create your first live app.

confirmDelete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
confirmDelete.message: This action cannot be undone. The app and all its data will be permanently deleted.

bridgeApp.title: Bridge App
bridgeApp.comingSoon: Bridge Apps connect traditional GUI applications with an operation Agent layer, bringing legacy software into the Agentic OS ecosystem. Coming soon.
